Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
